message:
fix(ci): Add 9 missing platform-independent tests to core6

Tests android, annotationlib, apple, crossinterp, devpoll, nturl2path,
tstring, xml_dom_xmlbuilder, and zstd were in core.txt but missing from
the split files. Added to core6, bringing it to 51 tests.

Updated CI job names to reflect accurate test counts.

files.patch:
@@ -115,7 +115,7 @@ jobs:
         timeout-minutes: 30
 
   test-metal0-core6:
-    name: Metal0 @core6 (42 tests)
+    name: Metal0 @core6 (51 tests)
     runs-on: ubuntu-22.04
     timeout-minutes: 30
     steps:
@@ -285,7 +285,7 @@ jobs:
         timeout-minutes: 30
 
   test-cpython-core6:
-    name: CPython @core6 (42 tests)
+    name: CPython @core6 (51 tests)
     runs-on: ubuntu-22.04
     timeout-minutes: 30
     steps:

@@ -1,3 +1,10 @@
+android
+annotationlib
+apple
+crossinterp
+devpoll
+nturl2path
+tstring
 ttk_textonly
 tuple
 turtle
@@ -31,6 +38,7 @@ weakset
 with
 wsgiref
 xml_dom_minicompat
+xml_dom_xmlbuilder
 xml_etree
 xmlrpc
 xxlimited
@@ -40,3 +48,4 @@ zipfile64
 zipimport
 zipimport_support
 zlib
+zstd
